items.title: ICE says 2 officers may have lied under oath about shooting migrant in Minnesota
items.description: The acting head of ICE says two officers appear to have made "untruthful statements" about shooting a migrant in Minnesota and may face federal charge...

items.title: Measles cases surpass 900 in US with infections in 24 states: CDC
items.description: Measles cases have surpassed 900 in the U.S., according to newly updated data from the CDC.

items.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Sheriff speaks to ABC News about DNA, gloves
items.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

items.title: WATCH:  Advice from seniors for Valentine's Day
items.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to four couples who've been together for a combined 200 years about the secrets to a lasting and loving relationship.

items.title: WATCH:  Huge sinkhole opens in Shanghai, China
items.description: The hole emerged amid metro excavations in the city.
